title: Manufacturing Engineer - Britannia Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Britannia Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
